description: Example user-facing semantic-to-IP mapping for an accelerator with a systolic array, a dedicated softmax IP, DMA, and small vector datapaths.

systolic_array_ip.notes: Use for GEMM/dot semantics executed on a systolic MAC array.

softmax_ip.notes: Use when exponential + reduction + broadcast + divide are realized by one dedicated softmax block.

exp_reduce_ip.notes: Use when only exponential + reduction are fused.

vector_mul_ip.notes: Elementwise multiply lane outside the systolic array.

vector_div_ip.notes: Standalone divide lane for unfused divide behavior.

reduction_tree_ip.notes: Standalone reduction hardware when no fused softmax-like block is present.

layout_or_dma_ip.notes: Broadcast/layout-only cost may be zero or can be redirected to a movement engine depending on implementation.
